outputs.description: The ID of the alert USTA.AccountTakeoverPrevention.username The username of the compromised credential
outputs.name: USTA.AccountTakeoverPrevention.id

outputs.description: The password of the compromised credential USTA.AccountTakeoverPrevention.url The URL of the compromised credential
outputs.name: USTA.AccountTakeoverPrevention.password

outputs.description: Whether the compromised credential is corporate USTA.AccountTakeoverPrevention.created The creation date of the compromised credential
outputs.name: USTA.AccountTakeoverPrevention.is_corporate

outputs.description: The IP address of the victim USTA.AccountTakeoverPrevention.victim_detail.country The country of the victim
outputs.name: USTA.AccountTakeoverPrevention.victim_detail.ip

outputs.description: The phone number of the victim USTA.AccountTakeoverPrevention.victim_detail.computer_name The computer name of the victim computer
outputs.name: USTA.AccountTakeoverPrevention.victim_detail.phone_number

outputs.description: The OS of the victim computer USTA.AccountTakeoverPrevention.victim_detail.language The language of the victim computer
outputs.name: USTA.AccountTakeoverPrevention.victim_detail.victim_os

outputs.description: The memory of the victim computer USTA.AccountTakeoverPrevention.victim_detail.cpu The CPU of the victim computer
outputs.name: USTA.AccountTakeoverPrevention.victim_detail.memory

outputs.description: The GPU of the victim computer USTA.AccountTakeoverPrevention.victim_detail.malware The family of the malware that infected the victim computer
outputs.name: USTA.AccountTakeoverPrevention.victim_detail.gpu

outputs.description: The infection date of the victim computer
outputs.name: USTA.AccountTakeoverPrevention.victim_detail.infection_date
